name: Oura Ring
description: Oura Ring is a health and wellness wearable that tracks sleep, activity, readiness, and vital signs. The API provides access to daily summaries, detailed sleep stages, heart rate data, workout sessions, and personal biometric information collected by the ring.

capabilities.name: get_daily_sleep
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily sleep summaries including total sleep duration, efficiency, latency, and sleep score for a date range.

capabilities.name: get_daily_activity
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily activity summaries including steps, calories burned, active time, and activity score for a date range.

capabilities.name: get_daily_readiness
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily readiness scores that indicate how recovered and prepared the user's body is, based on sleep, HRV, and temperature.

capabilities.name: get_heart_rate
capabilities.description: Retrieve continuous heart rate measurements recorded by the ring throughout the day and night.

capabilities.name: get_sleep_sessions
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed sleep session data including sleep stages (deep, REM, light, awake), heart rate, HRV, and movement during each sleep period.

capabilities.name: get_workouts
capabilities.description: Retrieve workout sessions detected or logged by the user, including activity type, duration, calories, and intensity metrics.

capabilities.name: get_personal_info
capabilities.description: Retrieve the user's personal profile information including age, weight, height, and biological sex as configured in their Oura account.
